name: poster-design-ai-skills

skills.name: midjourney-poster-generator
skills.description: 根据主题、风格、氛围生成专业级 Midjourney 海报提示词，包含完整艺术策展要素

skills.name: midjourney-style-matcher
skills.description: 智能匹配艺术流派、艺术家、色彩调性，输出专业风格关键词

skills.name: midjourney-composition-optimizer
skills.description: 提供高级版式设计：构图方案、视觉焦点、色彩搭配、排版层级

skills.name: midjourney-series-generator

skills.name: nanobanana-poster-generator

skills.name: nanobanana-style-matcher

skills.name: nanobanana-composition-optimizer

skills.name: nanobanana-series-generator
